font_family.heading: "Inter", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
font_family.body: "Inter", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

instructions: Use 'Inter' for all text. Import it from Google Fonts in index.css.
Headings should have tight tracking (-0.02em to -0.01em).
Body text should have relaxed line-height (1.6).
Use font-weight 500 or 600 for headings, rarely 700. Apple design favors medium weights over bold.
Ensure high contrast for primary text (#1D1D1F) and accessible grey (#86868B) for secondary.

Button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full text-sm font-medium transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

variants.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95
variants.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:border-gray-300 shadow-sm

Card.base: rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 bg-white text-card-foreground shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md

Input.base: flex h-11 w-full rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-gray-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary/20 focus-visible:border-primary/50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all

Sidebar.container: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-r border-gray-100 z-50 flex flex-col pt-6 pb-4 shadow-[1px_0_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]
Sidebar.link: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 mx-3 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-gray-50/80 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900

hero.style: relative min-h-[90vh] flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden bg-background
hero.elements: Use large centered typography, subtle floating 3D elements or parallax mosque imagery, and glass cards.

Landing.features: Use 'Bento Grid' layout for feature cards.
Landing.images: Use high-quality Islamic architecture images with white/gold overlays.

Auth.left_panel: hidden lg:flex flex-col justify-center p-12 bg-primary/5 relative

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards (4.5:1 ratio).
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE index.css: Import 'Inter' font, set root variables for colors/radius, apply global styles for body bg (#FBFBFD) and text.
2. UPDATE tailwind.config.js: Extend theme with new colors (primary, accent, neutral), borderRadius (xl, 2xl), and boxShadow (apple-style).
3. REFACTOR COMPONENTS: Update Button, Card, Input, and Sidebar to match the 'Apple' aesthetic defined in the 'components' section.
4. REFACTOR LAYOUTS: Ensure Dashboards use the Sidebar layout with proper spacing.
5. PRESERVE FUNCTIONALITY: Do not change any logic or imports related to the backend/API.
6. USE IMAGES: Use the provided image_urls for the Landing and Auth pages to set the mood.
7. REMOVE CLUTTER: Eliminate unnecessary borders, heavy shadows, and dense grids. Use whitespace.
8. GLASSMORPHISM: Apply glass effects to sticky headers and modals.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: - Design Anti-Patterns: No purple/teal CTAs. No gradients > 20%. No Center-Everything.
- Testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
